title: dryopteris tokyoensis
intro: Dryopteris tokyoensis, also known as Tokyo shield fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Dryopteris genus. This plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris tokyoensis are attributed to its ability to lower blood pressure, improve liver function, and boost the immune system. Dryopteris tokyoensis can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, making it a versatile ingredient in traditional medicine.
